keyPoints: Key point 1: Introducing R means learning the basics of the language.
Key point 2: Initiating R means setting up the environment and installing necessary packages.
Key point 3: Packages are my Friends because they extend the functionality of R.
Key point 4: Environments are where R stores objects and functions.
Key point 5: Functions are blocks of code that perform a specific task.
Key point 6: Flow Controls determine the order of execution in R.
Key point 7: Loops repeat a set of statements in R.
Key point 8: Basic Data Types in R are numbers, characters, and logical values.
Key point 9: Vectors in R are ordered collections of values.
